stem: The ratio of the length of line segment XY to the length of line segment ZV is 6 to 1. If the length of line segment XY is 102 inches, what is the length, in inches, of line segment ZV?
explanation: The ratio XY to ZV is 6 to 1, so XY = 6 × ZV. With XY = 102, solving 102 = 6 × ZV gives ZV = 17 inches.
